title: The Black Cat Plot Tightens Around Kaya
description: On pages 12–15, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I can't believe you're this kind of a person!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: In the past, I always listened to your lies, and turned them into hopes and dreams

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They made my life fill up with happiness

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I really liked the lies you made up!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But... now you're using it for revenge, and using it to harm a good person...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Dont worry, we'll throw this pest out!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Wahh! Wait, let go of me! I haven't finished talking yet!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You little brat! You're asking for it!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
